## Public Positioning Line

DEVAS turns operational friction into deal value intelligence.

## Final Meaning

DEVAS Pass 1 proves the system can intake friction categories, score friction severity, classify deal impact, detect buyer advantage, recommend bounded deal action, refuse incomplete packets, and generate a Deal Value Assessment Packet.
